name: Penne with Tomato, Black Olive and Feta
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot of boiling water, cook pasta until al dente (tender but firm). Drain and return to pot to keep warm.
2. Meanwhile, in a large nonstick frying pan, heat oil over medium heat. Stir in garlic.
3. Add tomatoes and cook, stirring, for 3 minutes or until heated through.
4. Transfer contents of the frying pan to the pot with the drained pasta. Add olives, feta cheese, parsley, and basil.
5. Gently toss to mix everything together.
6. Sprinkle each serving with freshly grated Parmesan cheese. Serves 4.
